schedule.title: Venue Setup and Load-in
schedule.description: Coordinate with site operations for stage assembly, lighting rig installation, and catering station placement.

schedule.title: Vendor Rehearsal and Soundcheck
schedule.description: Full technical run-through with sound engineers and entertainment team to ensure audio balance across the venue.

schedule.title: Grand Guest Arrival
schedule.description: Commencement of guest check-in at the grand entrance with red carpet styling and welcome refreshments.

schedule.title: Peak Celebration Hour
schedule.description: The birthday toast, cake cutting ceremony, and primary entertainment showcase for all 1000 guests.

schedule.title: Event Conclusion
schedule.description: Safe exit management and commencement of venue tear-down protocols.

checklist.task: Secure venue permit and event insurance for 1000 pax capacity
Design and dispatch digital invitations with RSVP tracking
Finalize catering menu and quantity for bulk service requirements
Install thematic lighting and ambient decor accents
Assign security team for crowd management and entry screening
Confirm parking arrangements and valet logistics

vendors.name: Grand Open-Air Grounds
vendors.description: Spacious grounds capable of hosting 1000 guests with power supply and security support.
tips: What is the total capacity for power grid load?
Are there designated zones for large-scale catering kitchens?

vendors.name: Elite Banquet Masters
vendors.description: High-volume catering service specializing in multi-cuisine buffet setups for large crowds.
tips: Can you provide a fast-refill strategy for 1000 guests?
Do you have experience managing buffet flow to prevent queues?

vendors.name: Sonic Waves Event Solutions
vendors.description: Professional sound reinforcement, DJ setup, and lighting for large event spaces.
tips: What is the reach of your speaker system for an open ground?
Do you provide backup generators for the audio system?

schedule.title: Vendor Setup and Site Inspection
schedule.description: Final load-in for catering, decor, and AV teams. Walkthrough of the entire floor plan to ensure safety protocols.

schedule.title: Guest Arrival and Welcome Drinks
schedule.description: Greet attendees with signature mocktails and light hors d'oeuvres while ambient jazz background music plays.

schedule.title: Celebration and Buffet Service
schedule.description: Opening remarks followed by the commencement of the multi-cuisine buffet service to accommodate 500 guests.

schedule.title: Event Wrap-up and Load-out
schedule.description: Closing of service, guest departure, and initial breakdown of technical equipment and floral installations.

checklist.task: Finalize guest list and send out digital invitations via WhatsApp/Email.
Procure necessary event permits for a gathering of 500 people.
Source locally available floral arrangements to maintain budget.
Coordinate with the catering lead on menu testing and allergen labeling.
Schedule on-site security and valet management for high vehicle volume.

vendors.name: Elite Banquet Services
vendors.description: Full-service buffet management capable of serving 500 guests with diverse regional menu options.
tips: What is the buffer quantity for extra servings?
Can you provide a detailed breakdown of the staffing ratios?

vendors.name: Garden Pavilion Estates
vendors.description: Spacious outdoor venue rental including basic lighting, power backup, and sufficient restroom facilities.
tips: Are there any restrictions on sound levels after 10 PM?
Does the rental fee include on-site cleaning staff?

vendors.name: Dynamic Sound & Rhythm
vendors.description: Comprehensive AV setup, professional DJ, and wireless microphone systems for announcements.
tips: Do you have a backup power generator for the equipment?
Can you provide a setlist for approval prior to the event?

schedule.title: Registration and Networking Breakfast
schedule.description: Guests arrive for badge pickup and light refreshments in the foyer.

schedule.title: Inaugural Keynote Session
schedule.description: Opening remarks and the primary industry address in the main auditorium.

schedule.title: Networking Luncheon
schedule.description: A curated buffet spread to facilitate attendee interaction and break-out discussions.

schedule.title: Interactive Workshop Modules
schedule.description: Hands-on collaborative sessions held in partitioned breakout rooms.

schedule.title: Closing Reception
schedule.description: Final networking cocktail session with appetizers and concluding remarks.

checklist.task: Secure venue booking and sign comprehensive liability waiver
Finalize audiovisual requirements and speaker tech rehearsals
Approve minimalist, branded stage design and floral decor
Confirm catering dietary restrictions and menu selection
Coordinate attendee check-in software and badge printing
Final walkthrough of the layout with venue management

vendors.name: The Grand Business Suites & Convention Hall
vendors.description: High-end corporate venue with integrated AV and professional lighting.
tips: What is your backup power contingency plan?
Are there restrictions on external signage placement?

vendors.name: Elite Gourmet Hospitality Services
vendors.description: Premium multi-cuisine buffet and high-quality tea-break services.
tips: How do you handle real-time replenishment during peak hours?
Can you provide a sample menu tailored for high-protein, brain-food lunch options?

vendors.name: Lumina Creative Tech Solutions
vendors.description: Professional sound engineering, LED wall deployment, and stage production.
tips: Do you provide a dedicated technician on-site throughout the event?
How quickly can you resolve audio feedback or connection issues?

schedule.title: Venue Setup & Decor Assembly
schedule.description: Coordinate with the decor vendor to set up balloon arches, table settings, and lighting ambient features.

schedule.title: Guest Arrival & Welcome Drinks
schedule.description: Welcome 20 guests with refreshing mocktails, background ambient music, and initial appetizer passing.

schedule.title: Cake Cutting Ceremony
schedule.description: Gather all guests around the main display table for birthday toasts, candle blowing, and photo opportunities.

schedule.title: Dinner Buffet & Entertainment
schedule.description: Serve the main buffet course while background music keeps the energy upbeat and engaging.

schedule.title: Return Gifts & Departure
schedule.description: Distribute personalized thank-you party favors to guests as the celebration concludes.

checklist.task: Finalize guest RSVP list and gather dietary restrictions
Order customized birthday cake and confirm delivery window
Purchase party favors, return gifts, and decorative paper goods
Confirm playlist and portable sound system setup
Coordinate decor color palette and backdrop design with stylist
Prepare designated cake-cutting table and serving utensils

vendors.name: Sweet Celebrations & Gourmet Bites
vendors.description: Provides a curated mini-buffet with starters, main dishes, and a custom 2 kg birthday cake for 20 guests.
tips: Can you accommodate specific dietary requests such as vegetarian or gluten-free options?
Are disposable dinnerware, napkins, and serving cutlery included in the package?

vendors.name: Dreamy Balloon & Party Stylists
vendors.description: Specializes in custom balloon arches, thematic backdrop setups, fairy lights, and table centerpieces.
tips: How many hours prior to the event start time will your team need for complete setup?
Does your pricing cover post-event dismantling and venue cleanup?

vendors.name: Moments & Melodies Studio
vendors.description: Offers 3 hours of coverage by a candid photographer alongside high-quality Bluetooth audio gear setup.
tips: What is the estimated delivery timeframe for the edited digital photo gallery?
Do you bring backup sound equipment and wireless microphones for toasts?
